heading: Obligations, participations, or other instruments as lawful investments; acceptance as security; exempt securities
label: 1723c Obligations, participations, or other instruments as lawful investments; acceptance as security; exempt securities
text: All obligations, participations, or other instruments issued by either of the bodies corporate named in shall be lawful investments, and may be accepted as security for all fiduciary, trust, and public funds, the investment or deposit of which shall be under the authority and control of the United States or any officer or officers thereof. All stock, obligations, securities, participations, or other instruments issued pursuant to this subchapter shall, to the same extent as securities which are direct obligations of or obligations guaranteed as to principal or interest by the United States, be deemed to be exempt securities within the meaning of laws administered by the Securities and Exchange Commission.section 1717(a)(2) of this title
notes: Amendments1992— struck out before period at end “; but all such issuances by the Association and all issuances of stock, and debt obligations convertible into stock, by the corporation shall be made only with the approval of the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development”.Pub. L. 102–5501984— inserted “by the Association and all issuances of stock, and debt obligations convertible into stock, by the corporation”.Pub. L. 98–4401968— substituted “either of the bodies corporate named in ” for “the Association,” and inserted provisions directing that all stock, obligations, securities, participations, or other instruments issued pursuant to this subchapter be deemed to be exempt securities, and requiring approval of the Secretary for all issuances.Pub. L. 90–448section 1717(a)(2) of this title1964— inserted “, participations, or other instruments” after “obligations”.Pub. L. 88–560

Effective Date of 1968 AmendmentFor effective date of amendment by title VIII of , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. L. 90–448section 808 of Pub. L. 90–448section 1716b of this title
